pre_existing_disease_waiting_months._reconciliation: Bug #44: base was null ('not stated in ...pdf'). The __wordings sibling carries the unambiguous clause: '48 months waiting period from Policy Commencement Date for all Pre-existing Conditions'. Sourced value 48 filled in.
